message:
Apply consistent format string interpolation across codebase

Convert format strings from separate argument style to inline interpolation:
- Change `format!("{}", x)` to `format!("{x}")`
- Change `println!("{}", x)` to `println!("{x}")`
- Change `assert!(cond, "msg {}", x)` to `assert!(cond, "msg {x}")`

Affected modules: bytes, channel, cli, conformance, cx, grpc, http, io,
lab, net, observability, record, runtime, sync, test_utils, time, trace,
transport, types

Also updates examples, benchmarks, and tests for consistency.

This aligns with modern Rust style (RFC 2795) for cleaner, more readable
format strings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
